subject: Q3 Budget Report
body:
Hi,

Please find the Q3 budget report attached. We came in 3% under budget this quarter which is great news.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Best,
John

subject: Updated PTO Policy
body:
Dear Team,

We have updated our PTO policy for 2024. Key changes include:

- Increased annual PTO from 20 to 25 days
- Rollover limit increased to 10 days
- New mental health days (3 per year)

Please review the full policy on the intranet.

Regards,
HR Department

subject: Lunch tomorrow?
body:
Hey!

Want to grab lunch tomorrow? That new Thai place on 5th Ave looks amazing.

Let me know!
Sarah

subject: Scheduled Maintenance - March 16
body:
Hi Engineering,

We'll be performing scheduled maintenance on the CI/CD pipeline this Saturday (March 16) from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM EST.

During this window:
- Jenkins will be offline
- Docker registry will be read-only
- Deployments should be frozen

Please plan accordingly.

Thanks,
DevOps Team

subject: Code Review Request - PR #427
body:
Hi,

Could you review PR #427 when you get a chance? It's the auth middleware refactor we discussed last sprint.

No rush - just before end of week would be great.

Thanks,
Mike

subject: Expense Report Deadline
body:
Reminder: All March expense reports must be submitted by March 31st.

Please use the standard expense form on the intranet portal. Receipts over $25 must be attached.

Questions? Contact finance@company.com

Thanks,
Finance Team

subject: Meeting Notes - REDACTED Standup
body:
Hi,

Here are the notes from today's security standup:

1. Vulnerability scan completed - 3 medium findings in staging
2. SOC reported increase in phishing attempts targeting our domain
3. MFA rollout for contractors starts next Monday
4. Penetration test scheduled for April

Action items tracked in Jira.

Best,
Lisa

subject: Company All-Hands - March 20
body:
Dear Team,

Please join us for our quarterly all-hands meeting on March 20 at 2:00 PM EST.

Agenda:
- Q1 results and outlook
- New product announcements
- Team recognition awards
- Open Q&A

Calendar invite to follow.

Best regards,
Office of the CEO

subject: Re: Project Timeline
body:
Sounds good! Let's plan for a soft launch on April 1st and GA on April 15th.

I'll update the roadmap and share it with stakeholders tomorrow.

Cheers,
Tom
